purpose: Wire the stateless typed cash mutation boundary into the unique production composition and physically delete the three Main cash mutation methods.

hot_file_changes.change: Instantiate exactly one PlayerCashMutationPort next to WorldSessionState and MonsterWagerCashCommitmentQueryPort.

Configure the port with the existing WorldSessionState and commitment query port, then inject it into the product-market, city-GDP-derivative and monster-upgrade consumers. Fail closed if unavailable.

After every production caller uses the typed port, physically delete _commit_product_market_cash_delta, _commit_city_gdp_derivative_cash_delta and _apply_role_monster_upgrade_cash plus dead helpers used only by them. Do not retain wrappers or fallback.

consumer_changes.change: Pass stable lifecycle transaction IDs to PlayerCashMutationPort. Remove dynamic Main cash calls and post-hoc cents reconciliation. Futures open uses the allocated position ID; settlement uses position ID plus reason; immediate card income uses the card execution transaction ID.

Allocate or bind the stable position ID before debit, pass stable open/settlement transaction IDs to PlayerCashMutationPort, and remove dynamic Main cash calls and reconciliation. A failed open must preserve the current position-sequence semantics.

Resolve the existing public role card from WorldSessionState, use monster UID plus resulting rank as the exact-once ID, call commit_role_monster_upgrade_cash, and keep presentation as a separate typed/event path. Remove the Main cash callback.

forbidden: timestamp or frame based transaction IDs
public exposure of cash or commitment diagnostics
required_negative_gates: no dynamic Main cash call in product or GDP bridges
